description: Delete a unified knowledge document or directory by path. Document paths must end with `.md`; directory paths do not. Returns a plain-text status line.

kind.description: Whether the target is a knowledge document or a knowledge directory.

path.description: Current type-prefixed path. Use a `.md` suffix for `kind=document`, for example `reference/render-pipeline/urp-notes.md`; omit `.md` for `kind=directory`.
